resources.string: Location permission is required for cell tower tracking
Unable to load map tiles.\nCheck your internet connection and try again.
Walk around to get a reading…

Cell Tower ID needs background location access to continue monitoring cell towers when your screen is off.\n\nA visible notification is always shown during collection. All data is stored locally on your device and is never sent to any server.
Background location lets Cell Tower ID detect transient towers that appear briefly. You can enable it later in Settings \u2192 Apps \u2192 Cell Tower ID \u2192 Permissions.
Cell Tower ID maps cell towers around you and tracks signal strength across LTE, 5G, and legacy networks.
Identify IMSI catchers and rogue base stations that may intercept your communications. All detection is passive and defensive.
All data stays on your device. Nothing is ever sent to a server. You control when collection starts, stops, and when data is deleted.
Cell Tower ID needs location access to identify nearby cell towers. A notification is always shown during collection.
